creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
Created attachment 243678
emulators/mame: Update to 0.257 and some minor cleanups

* Update to 0.257 (https://www.mamedev.org/?p=527)
* Add a hopefully more meaningful description for option NLS
* Fix description on option QTDEBUGGER, it is built as part of MAME, not installed separately as might be implied
* Clean up pkg-message.in and hopefully clarify the mess with MAME configuration data.
